betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Industrial Steam Turbine§f converts steam into §bHE power§f.

§eTask:§f Craft 1x §bIndustrial Steam Turbine§f (machine_large_turbine)

§eTurbine Hierarchy:§f
• Basic Turbine - Early game, low throughput
• §bIndustrial Steam Turbine§f (this) - Mid-game workhorse
• Leviathan Steam Turbine - Massive capacity

§eOperation:§f
• Input: Steam from boilers or reactor cooling
• Output: §bHE energy§f for your power grid
• Returns §bLow-Pressure Steam§f or water

§eSteam Sources:§f
• §bIndustrial Boiler§f + heat source
• Reactor cooling loops
• Heat exchangers

§aTip:§f Match turbine capacity to steam production. For massive throughput, upgrade to Leviathan.
